subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-04-30
subcodes.first_line: I will leave Stuttgart tomorrow. Praised be God that we came here and met with you all, and that sentiments of the utmost spiritual affection
subcodes.first_line_orig: فردا ما از استتکارت حرکت خواهیم کرد الحمدلله باینجا آمدیم شماها را ملاقات نمودیم
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @East and West; communication between East and West
